resources.string: All prices shown include VAT. A user account is required to purchase a plan. Legal information about the provider can be found here.
Please note that the country selected cannot be modified in the future. If you wish to change this information later, you will need to create a new account.
Enter your current country of residence. Please note that once selected, it cannot be modified later.
Please note your country cannot be changed in the future
This offer is applicable in selected countries only

"The Wallbox is ready to charge.
Charging will begin after authorisation and a vehicle is connected."

"The Wallbox is ready to charge.
Charging will begin after authorisation and a vehicle is connected. "
A vehicle is connected to the Wallbox and is charging
Unable to charge — Wallbox is in error mode. Please consult your user manual and, if necessary, contact customer support.
The Wallbox is connected to a vehicle. The charging process has either finished or has been stopped by the vehicle.
The vehicle was successfully connected to the Wallbox — however, charging cannot continue because the power supply has been interrupted.
Charging has been enabled and will start once a vehicle is connected to the Wallbox

"The Wallbox is offline — its current status and active charging information cannot be displayed.
The \"Restart\" and \"Access restriction\" functions are unavailable."
The Wallbox is offline — its current status cannot be displayed.

"The Wallbox is offline — its current status and charging information cannot be displayed.
Active charging will resume only when the Wallbox is online again.
The \"Restart\" and \"Access restriction\" functions are unavailable. "
The Wallbox is connected to a vehicle. The charging process starts as soon as it has been authorised.
The Wallbox is connected to a vehicle. A time when the charging process can start has been specified in the vehicle.
This text field cannot be empty
Become an Aral PAYBACK member and earn PAYBACK points on your Aral pulse charges!
Please always familiarise yourself with the currently applicable prices before you start charging. They can be found in the MyŠkoda app.
I already have a charging card
After activating your card, you will be able to authorise charging.
"Add your first Powerpass charging card. Please note that to activate the card, you will need a Powerpass charging plan. "
"Your current public charging card will be removed "
"To connect the charging card to your account, enter the card number. "
Add your active subscription to the card below
You can connect this card to your public charging contract (your account). If you have already connected a card, your current card will be removed.
To charge in our charging network, you can use the MyŠkoda app or, depending on the model and availability, Plug&Charge.
Even if you have deactivated your card, you can still use the MyŠkoda app or Plug&Charge for charging.
After deactivating, you will no longer be able to use charging with this card (unless you reactivate it).

"As standard, you will receive two charging cards (RFID) for use with your Wallbox.
To order additional charging cards, please contact your Wallbox provider or Elli customer service."

*Calls are free of charge (Monday to Sunday 06:00 - 22:00). Calls from mobile phones may incur charges, depending on your provider. If it does not permit you to call this number, ask your provider to enable \"00800\" numbers. Roaming charges may apply when calling from abroad.
What type of card would you like to order?

"Your current card for public charging will be cancelled as soon as you place your order.
Please note that until your new card has been delivered, you will not have a charging card to authorise public charging sessions.
(The delivery of a new card can take approximately 5 working days). "
Cancel charging card and order a new one?
Your new charging card will be posted to you free of charge
Your new charging card will be posted to you free of charge
Once you have charged your car, the records will appear here.

"These plans are provided by an external provider. If you do not wish your vehicle account data to be shared with this provider, you can make an alternative agreement, without the special conditions, by following the link below.
All prices include VAT and are valid only in the country where your account is registered."
The agreement ends automatically, with the option of renewal.
The contract is automatically renewed and may be terminated upon request up to 14 days before the next automatic renewal
To use Plug&Charge, your vehicle must support this feature.
All prices shown include VAT. To purchase a plan from Elli, you will need a user account. You can find legal information about Elli her.
Prices in other countries and Selected Partners Network

These are plans are provided by Volkswagen Group Charging. If you do not wish your Škoda ID data to be shared with Volkswagen Group Charging, you can make an alternative agreement through www.elli.eco without the special conditions offered by Volkswagen. All prices include VAT and are valid only in the country where your account is registered.
A list of Selected Partners can be found here.

Prices vary depending on the charging point operator and charging speed. They may include fixed fees (e.g. a session fee), price per kWh, or time-based fees. Charges may vary during the day. For pricing details, see the details of the relevant charging station in the Maps section.

A fixed price applies at all Ionity charging stations. Prices vary depending on the charging point operator and charging connector. They may include fixed fees (e.g. a session fee), price per kWh, or time-based fees. Prices may vary during the day. For pricing details, see the details of the relevant charging station in the Maps section.

"Prices at charging stations not operated by IONITY network members are billed by Volkswagen Group Charging GmbH (Elli) on behalf of the station operator.
Prices are billed individually, based on kWh, session length, or time of day, or any combination of them. Some operators may apply standing charges.
Before charging, you can check an operator's charging prices in the IONITY app. When charging abroad, an exchange fee may be subsequently applied."
It may take up to 24 hours to collect all the data
A lower trigger makes solar charging more likely
"With solar power forecasting, charging at the Wallbox will occur only if your photovoltaic system generates this amount of energy. "
Your changes could not be made
Use the slider to select the correct value here. %s kW is the solar power you have entered.
To use Powerpass services, please give your consent to document.

Dear Customer, we have updated “%s”. We already informed you of the specific changes by email. If you agree to this now, your charging contract, including automatic renewal, will continue as normal. However, if you do not agree, we will terminate the contract in accordance with the currently valid conditions.
Choose the right currency for your plan
Please note that once your home charging plan is deleted, you will no longer be able to benefit from cost-optimised charging.
The region corresponds to your grid code. You can find both in your energy contract. If you cannot find this information or you need any other help, contact your electricity provider.
Select the region where your dynamic rate applies
Your Dynamic Plan has been set up successfully

"Now you can charge your car more cheaply and cost-effectively.
To start cost-optimised charging, first ensure that you have set up a departure timer.
If your energy contract changes, remember to update your home charging plan."
When charging your vehicle, remember to set a departure time so that your vehicle is fully charged for your next trip.
The energy plan you enter is connected to your profile. You can set up different plans for different locations. If you delete your profile, your plan will also be deleted.
"To charge when it's cheapest for you, enter the prices shown in your energy contract. To start cost-optimised charging, select the \"Intelligent charging\" mode in your vehicle. "

"To ensure that your battery is fully charged, the charging process may continue into more expensive periods.
Please note that your charging plan data (e.g. times and prices) cannot be changed during charging. To avoid unexpected costs, please check your energy contract before charging. "
By proceeding, your car will charge based on the data you entered.

"To start cost-optimised charging, select the \"Intelligent Charging\" charging mode in your vehicle.
If your energy contract changes, remember to update your home charging plan."
Your price has been added successfully
If your energy contract includes cheaper prices on certain days (weekends or weekdays), select those days.
Select days to assign prices to
If your contract includes weekend and weekday prices (or is cheaper on a specific day of the week) add days.
Do you pay different prices depending on the day of the week in your first season?
Does your plan charge different prices depending on the day of the week?
"Do you pay different prices depending on the day of the week in your second season? "
Select the first and last months of your season
Prices for your first season have been added successfully
How many different prices does your plan offer on %s?
How many prices does your energy contract in your first season?
How many different prices does your energy contract offer?
How many prices does your energy contract in your second season?
Your progress will not be saved
"If you pay different prices depending on the time of year (e.g. winter or summer prices), your plan is seasonal-based. "
Does your energy contract include seasonal prices?

"Now you can take advantage of cheaper and more cost-effective charging.
To start cost-optimised charging, select the \"Intelligent Charging\" mode in your vehicle.
If your energy contract changes, remember to update your home charging plan."
All prices have been added successfully
Dynamic rates depending on market rates
Multiple per kWh prices — depending on the time of day, day of the week, or season.
What rates does your energy contract offer?
If you want to change the days, you will need to create a new plan.

"All prices shown include VAT.
To purchase a plan from Elli, you will need a user account. You can find legal information about Elli here."
"To sign up to the new tariffs, please update your app. "
Please try again. If the error persists, please contact Škoda support.
Unable to connect to the internet. Please check your connection.
Unable to connect to the cloud server
Some data could not be loaded
Based on your filter options, no records exist so far of any charging sessions.

"The temporary hold will be placed on your card for this session — but don’t worry, you won’t be charged this amount.
This is just a pre-authorisation to confirm your payment method. You’ll be charged only for the actual cost of your charging session."
The amount is temporarily reserved (pre-authorisation payment)
"If two-factor authentication (2FA) is required, you’ll be redirected to your bank's secure page to verify the payment. The pre-authorisation amount will be released shortly afterwards."
The PDF export is limited to a period of 31 days
The PDF export is limited to a period of 31 days
Once you start receiving invoices, you will be able to view them here.
Your billing address must be located in the country where your account is registered
Hassle-free charging anywhere in Europe. Simply register and choose your plan.
Please select your preferred payment method
Always check price details in the Maps section. Prices may include cost per kWh, time-based costs, and session costs.
Your plan is now active. You can start charging right away by going to the Maps section of MyŠkoda and selecting Chargers, or by using your Powerpass charging card.

"Your plan is now active. You can start charging right away by going to the Maps section of MyŠkoda and selecting Chargers.
Later on, you can always order a charging card or link it to this subscription. "

"Your plan is now active. You can start charging right away by going to the Maps section of MyŠkoda and selecting Chargers.
Once you receive your Powerpass charging card, don't forget to link it to your subscription."
To pay for charging, please set up a payment method for your account.
An error occurred while registering your payment option. Please contact your payment card provider.
Once deactivated, automatic renewal for this contract can no longer be activated
Your payment card has expired. Please update your payment method or contact our support team.
"Your new plan will be activated after your current plan expires. The new plan will be activated on %s. "
Good news! Your plan has been purchased.
"You will be redirected to the cancellation process on the provider's website"
You will be redirected to the cancellation process on the Elli website
To change or cancel this follow-up plan, please phone or email your provider.
To change or cancel this follow-up plan, please contact Elli Customer Care.
Your contract will not renew automatically
You can start using your new plan
To resume using Plug & Charge authorisation, please remotely reactivate Plug & Charge for your vehicle.

"Do you want to deactivate Plug & Charge for your vehicle?
If you deactivate Plug & Charge, your subscription will remain active, but you will need to use alternative authorisation methods, such as an app or an RFID card.
You can always reactivate Plug & Charge, in the MyŠkoda app or your vehicle's Infotainment System."
"Select the account you want to activate and connect to your car "
Unable to activate Plug & Charge. Please try again.
No other third-party providers are available. You will therefore require a charging plan with Plug&Charge
Please always familiarise yourself with the currently applicable prices before you start charging. They can be found in the account app.

"You already have Plug & Charge installed in a different vehicle.
If you proceed, Plug & Charge will be activated in this vehicle and deactivated in the other."

"You are about to activate this new contract using Plug & Charge. Activation usually takes several minutes but may last up to 24 hours.
If you already have an active Plug & Charge contract, tapping \"Continue\" will immediately deactivate your existing contract."
This process usually takes several minutes
This process usually takes several minutes
Delete Plug & Charge from my subscriptions

"You are about to temporarily deactivate the Plug & Charge service for your vehicle.
To permanently remove the service from your contract, tap the checkbox below."
"You are about to temporarily deactivate the Plug & Charge service for your vehicle. "
To permanently delete the service from your account, please contact your subscription provider.

"This process may take some time.
Please make sure your vehicle is still online."
You can remotely switch Plug & Charge on or off for your vehicle without affecting your subscription.
To resume using the Plug & Charge authorisation method, you will need to reactivate Plug & Charge.
To ensure that your car meets all the requirements for installing Plug & Charge, we need to carry out some basic checks.
Make sure your car is online
Your car can’t be in an underground car park
Your car is Plug & Charge compatible
Solar power forecasting has been selected, but the charging trigger has not been activated due to surplus photovoltaic energy.
Solar power forecasting is based on weather forecast data and your photovoltaic system. Using the charging trigger, we optimise the charging time based on future solar power forecasts.
To enable this function, open your photovoltaic system and adjust your photovoltaic connection.
To use forecast charging, you will first need to install a photovoltaic system.

If your photovoltaic system produces more electricity than your household consumes, a surplus is generated. Instead of feeding this excess energy into the public energy grid, it can be transferred to the battery.
The solar system could not be loaded. Please try again.
Are you sure you want to stop this charging session?
The price is fixed until %s and is valid for the whole session.
Your price reservation has been updated. Please check the prices.
Please ensure the correct cable is connected before you charge your car
I agree to General Terms and Conditions of Use and Cancellation Information.
I have acknowledged the Privacy Policy of my Provider.
I hereby accept the General Terms of Use and acknowledge the terms of cancellation.
To proceed, please accept the General Terms of Use.
To complete the purchase, please accept the General Terms of Use.
I consent to the General Terms and Conditions of Use and the cancellation information.
All prices include VAT and are valid only in the country where your account is registered.
I have acknowledged the Privacy Policy of Volkswagen Group Charging GmbH (Elli).

"The most reliable and convenient charging at low rates with our Selected Partner Network.
Current Selected Partner Network members*:"
Your progress will not be saved
If you have several solar modules, please select the direction of the largest module.
Please select the direction of your solar modules
This value may not be possible
0° means that your solar modules are mounted flat on a roof. 90° means that they are mounted on a very steep sloping roof.
What is the tilt angle of the solar modules?
To generate an accurate solar power forecast, enter the maximum peak power of your solar system. If you have several modules, you can combine these values into a single amount.
You can find this information in your solar system documentation
What is the capacity of your solar system?
The peak power is usually between 7 kWp and 15 kWp per household
Value is too high. It must be between 0 and 999.
To calculate the most accurate charging forecast, we use the charging location displayed in your Profile.
If the address displayed is incorrect, go to your Profile settings and change your charging location.
Simply plug in your car. Solar charging is available throughout the day, if there is enough solar power.
When solar panels are used, your charger can predict the ideal time to automatically charge your vehicle, based on solar energy.
Enter basic information about your solar module. You can add only one module.
To maximise solar charging, we base our predictions on both weather and solar forecasts.
To ensure optimal charging, we are now calculating your solar power forecast.
You can continue with onboarding and refine your settings, or do this later in the settings.
Your solar power forecasting has been successfully set up and is now active!
Invalid code. Please check it and try again.
This voucher code is invalid in the country where you are currently located
Find out more about the Terms of Use
"Do you have a voucher? To redeem it and use it for charging, you will need to have an active plan with your provider."
"Do you have a voucher? To use it, please set up a Powerpass charging plan."

"If you have a voucher, you can redeem it here.
The credit will be used when you next charge your car."
To use your credit, please renew your plan.
Manage access to ensure greater security
You decide who accesses your Wallbox
Software updates offer an ever-growing range of functions and continuously upgrade your Wallbox
Volkswagen Group Charging GmbH (Elli) offers compatible Wallboxes. Tap the button to be redirected to the Elli website.
Our app also offers an overview of charging history. With Škoda iV Charger Connect+, you can export and organise this information by date and charging card and even access energy meter data.
Start and stop charging from anywhere
You can remotely control your Wallbox with your phone. Start and stop charging whenever and wherever you want.
The Škoda Wallbox turns your parking space into an easy-to-use charging point. Thanks to the MyŠkoda app, you can always access all charging functions and information.
"Enter the pairing code that came with your Wallbox (it can be found on the packaging). "

"A QR code was provided with your Wallbox packaging — you will need it to continue.
For information on processing of your personal data, please refer to the privacy policy.
"
To connect the charging card to your account, enter the card number.
"You can start charging as soon as a vehicle has been connected to your Wallbox. Or, you can first authenticate your Wallbox, with your charging card or the app. "
Automatic updates ensure optimum performance and provide new features
"A charging card is already connected to your account. You can add more charging cards or complete your Wallbox onboarding. "
"You have successfully added your charging card. You can add more charging cards or complete your Wallbox onboarding. "

"The charging point ID and security code were provided with your Wallbox. You can find this information on the sticker on your Wallbox packaging.
For information on personal data processing, please refer to our privacy policy."

"You can either scan the QR code provided with your Wallbox or enter the code manually.
The QR code was delivered with the Wallbox. You can find it on the sticker on your Wallbox packaging."
Give your Wallbox a unique name?
For easier identification of your Wallbox, we suggest that you give it a unique name.
"You have now onboarded your Wallbox. You can change the settings at any time in the Wallbox menu. "
"Your Wallbox is now linked to your account. You can now configure your Wallbox to fit your needs."
"You can either scan the QR code on your charging card or enter the card number manually "

"With authentication, you will always be asked to confirm your identity via your charging card or in the app.
Without authentication, you can charge immediately once a car has been connected to your Wallbox."
Do you want to add authentication?
Your Wallbox helps you save on charging costs by analysing real-time energy prices and automatically scheduling charging when prices are low

"Do you want to unlink your Wallbox from your account?
If you do so, all Wallbox settings will be deleted. This cannot be undone."
We were unable to unlink your Wallbox. Please try again.
Restarting can fix temporary errors or malfunctions — however, this process will end any active charging sessions.

"An error occurred while restarting your Wallbox. Please try again.
If this issue persists, please contact Elli Customer Care."
Your Wallbox is currently offline. To restart, please ensure that it is switched on.
You can find more information about software updates at Volkswagen Group Charging GmbH (Elli).
To update your software, your Wallbox must be connected to the internet.
Your Wallbox software is up to date
Thanks to solar panels, your charger can predict the ideal time to auto-charge your car using solar energy. Make the most of sunny days with smart charging.
"To help you find your Wallbox, you can add a specific location. "
For easier identification of your Wallbox, we suggest that you give it a unique name.
Give your Wallbox a unique name?
The photovoltaic system is used for charging and for generating forecasts for your Wallbox
After your photovoltaic system has been deleted, forecasting will no longer be available.
Are you sure you want to delete your photovoltaic charging system?
